blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 48".
